name: Maheshwari Logistics Limited
summary: Maheshwari Logistics Limited provides logistics services in India. The company operates through three segments: Trading, Transportation & Port Service, and Manufacturing Kraft Paper. It offers bulk cargo transportation services for a range of sectors, including cement, paper, textiles, fertilizers, and other industries. The company also deals in coal, lignite, pet coke, diesel, waste paper, writing paper, kraft paper, and other papers; and manufactures recycled kraft papers. As of March 31, 2020, it had a fleet of approximately 100 trucks and trailers, and affiliation with approximately 10,000 third party truck owners. Maheshwari Logistics Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Valsad, India.
